What is broken becomes more beautiful. | --- ## 2. Owner Profile -- **Identity**: NumbahWan Group founder/operator -- **Review device**: iPhone (375px viewport), 5G, iOS Safari -- **Communication**: Direct, visual-first, action-oriented. Bilingual EN/繁中, also uses JP. -- **Feedback style**: Screenshots from iPhone with green-circle annotations = problem areas -- **Approval signal**: Silence or moving to next task = approved -- **Frustration signal**: Repeating the same feedback twice = you missed it the first time -- **Hard rules**: - - No emoji in UI (use SVG/WebP professional icons instead) - - No placeholder text, no "Coming Soon", no "Redirecting" - - Dark premium fintech aesthetic always - - Buy buttons redirect to `/buy.html` instantly (no popups, no toasts) - - Every visible string must have EN, ZH, JP translations +- **Role**: NumbahWan Group founder/operator +- **Communication**: Direct, visual-first, action-oriented. Bilingual EN/Traditional Chinese. +- **Review Device**: iPhone (375px viewport), iOS Safari +- **Languages**: EN, Traditional Chinese (繁中), Japanese (JP) +- **Quality Bar**: No emoji as icons. No placeholder text. No amateur gradients. Real professional assets only. + +### Decision Pattern Decoder + +| Signal | Meaning | Action | +|--------|---------|--------| +| Screenshot with green circles | These spots need fixing | Fix exactly those spots | +| Says "plz" | Wants immediate action | Do it now, no discussion | +| Repeats same feedback | Previous fix failed | Try completely different approach | +| "Too big" / "revert" | Overshot | Go subtle, 50% of what you did | +| Screenshot without comment | This is the problem | Figure it out, don't ask | +| Silence or next task | Approved | Move on | + +### Critical Frustration Triggers + +1. **Images overflowing mobile viewport** — Fix: Triple-layer overflow (html + body + container, all max-width:100%) +2. **Fonts too big breaking layout** — Fix: Only bump 9-13px text to 11-15px. NEVER touch headings/stat values/ticker prices +3. **Repeated failed approaches** — Fix: If method fails twice, abandon entirely. Try opposite approach +4. **Being asked obvious questions** — Fix: Just do it. Ask forgiveness not permission +5. **Placeholder/emoji in production** — Fix: Use professional SVG/WebP. Generate if missing +6. **GitHub auth burning time** — Fix: `setup_github_environment` then IMMEDIATELY push. No diagnostics between --- ## 3. Design System ### Colors -``` -bg: #06060c -card: #0e0e18 -card_hover: #14142a -border: #1e1e3a -border_glow: rgba(201,168,76,0.25) -gold: #c9a84c -gold_dark: #8a6914 -cyan: #00d4ff -rose: #e8a0bf -green: #00d26a -red: #ff4757 -purple: #a855f7 -text: #f0ece0 -text_dim: #8a8678 + +```css +:root { + --bg: #06060c; + --card: #0e0e18; + --card-hover: #14142a; + --border: #1e1e3a; + --border-glow: rgba(201,168,76,0.25); + --gold: #c9a84c; + --gold-dark: #8a6914; + --cyan: #00d4ff; + --rose: #e8a0bf; + --green: #00d26a; + --red: #ff4757; + --purple: #a855f7; + --text: #f0ece0; + --text-dim: #8a8678; +} ``` ### Typography -``` -display: Cormorant Garamond, Noto Serif TC, serif -body: Inter, Noto Sans TC, Noto Sans JP, system-ui, sans-serif -mono: JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, monospace -accent: Noto Serif TC -``` -### Layout Rules -- All pages use `overflow-x: hidden` on `html, body` -- Mobile breakpoint: `@media (max-width: 768px)` -- ONE consolidated `@media` block per breakpoint per page (no competing blocks) -- Images: `max-width: 100%` on BOTH container AND ``, container gets `overflow: hidden` -- Font scaling: only bump nav, body, labels, badges. Luxury gold meets tech. Not crypto-bro, more Swiss-bank-meets-silicon. --- -## 4. i18n Architecture +## 4. Mobile Rules (CRITICAL) + +Every mobile bug the owner has flagged comes down to these rules. Violate them and you will be asked to revert. + +```css +/* VIEWPORT LOCK */ + -Each page has an inline `T` object with three locale blocks: -```javascript -const T = { - en: { heroTitle: 'KINTSUGI', heroSub: 'Beauty in Imperfection...', ... }, - zh: { heroTitle: '金繕幣', heroSub: '世界上最安全的幣...', ... }, - jp: { heroTitle: '金繕コイン', heroSub: '世界一安全なコイン...', ... } -}; +/* TRIPLE-LAYER OVERFLOW PROTECTION */ +html, body { overflow-x: hidden; max-width: 100vw; } +* { max-width: 100vw; } /* nuclear catch-all */ +.section, .feature-row, .feature-img { max-width: 100%; overflow: hidden; } +img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; } + +/* WORD SAFETY */ +* { word-break: keep-all; overflow-wrap: break-word; } + +/* SINGLE MOBILE BLOCK — never add a second one for the same breakpoint */ +@media (max-width: 768px) { + /* ALL mobile rules go here. Second block will override first via cascade. */ +} + +/* FONT SCALING */ +/* Only bump 9-13px text to 11-15px. Leave 16px+ alone. */ +/* NEVER touch h1, h2, stat values, or ticker prices. */ ``` -- Language stored in `localStorage` key: `kin_lang` (default: `en`) -- Toggle via `setLang('zh')` / `setLang('jp')` / `setLang('en')` -- `t('key')` function returns localized string -- `data-i18n="key"` attribute on HTML elements for auto-translation -- ALL user-visible strings need all 3 locales. No exceptions. + +**Breakpoints**: Pr

-# Mycelium : For self-improving codebases +# Mycelium -### 116 pages. 62 JS modules. 30 API routes. 3 languages. Zero frameworks. - -A browser-based world built entirely with **vanilla JS**, **Hono**, and **Cloudflare Workers**.
-No React. No Vue. No Next. Just HTML files and a lot of stubbornness. - -[![Live Site](https://img.shields.io/badge/Live-numbahwan.pages.dev-ff9500?style=for-the-badge&logo=cloudflare&logoColor=white)](https://numbahwan.pages.dev) -[![The Oracle](https://img.shields.io/badge/Try-The%20Oracle-ffd700?style=for-the-badge&logo=sparkles&logoColor=black)](https://numbahwan.pages.dev/oracle) -[![Showcase](https://img.shields.io/badge/Browse-All%20116%20Pages-333?style=for-the-badge)](https://numbahwan.pages.dev/showcase) +### Self-improving codebase immune system -
+**Four scripts. Zero dependencies. Drop into any repo.**

+**NEVER** manually run `git push` + `gh pr create` + `gh pr merge` separately.
+Two bugs recurred 3+ times before this was fixed:
+1. **Auth token expires** → `git push` fails with "Invalid username or token"
+2. **Workflow stops after PR creation** → PR never gets merged
+

fixCommits.body:
PROBLEM: selfHeal gated at 10 commits, but squash workflow compresses 4-5→1,
so heal almost never fires. Post-commit only printed a reminder instead of acting.
gitwise had no deep root-cause analysis (eval says 'not deep enough').
Both systems were blind to each other's data.

FIXES:
1. selfHeal gate: 10→3 commits (both gitwise + nw-memory)
2. Post-commit hook: auto-runs --heal + --postfix on fix detection (was: just a reminder)
3. Post-merge hook: --sync for both systems (catches PR merges)
4. gitwise Action 7: deep root-cause analysis — extracts recurring themes from
   repeat offenders (word frequency across breakage lessons)
5. gitwise Action 8: cross-system sync — maps NW-Memory constraints (by area)
   to gitwise risk files (by path keyword matching). 109 constraints synced.
6. gitwise warn(): now surfaces constraints + deep analysis themes at pre-commit
7. Two new learnings recorded for automation area

PIPELINE NOW: commit → hook → learn → snapshot → selfHeal(3) → eval → sync
N

+## Two Learning Systems (both active)
+
+### gitwise (passive — zero config, zero commands)
+gitwise watches every commit and warns before you repeat a mistake. You don't run it.
+- **Post-commit hook**: auto-learns breakages, file couplings, risk patterns
+- **Pre-commit hook**: auto-warns if staged files have broken before or are missing coupled files
+- **Dashboard**: `node gitwise.cjs --status` (danger scores, riskiest files, couplings)
+- **Manual warn**: `node gitwise.cjs --warn` (test what warnings staged files would get)
+- **Install on any repo**: `node gitwise.cjs --install` (scans history, sets up hooks)
+
+### NW-Memory (active — discipline-based power tool)
+NW-Memory stores constraints, decisions, breakages, and learnings you explicitly record.
+Both tools share intelligence: NW-Memory uses gitwise's deep lesson extraction (commit body + diff analysis)
+for auto-reflect, postfix, and breakage recording.
+
+| What | gitwise does automatically | NW-Memory adds on top |
+|------|--------------------------|----------------------|
+| Learn from fixes | Reads commit body + diff | Stores in constraints/learnings |
+| Warn before mistakes | Pre-commit: "broke 7x, danger 31.9" | --guard: area constraints + coupled files |
+| Risk tracking | Danger score per file | Area-level breakage history |
+| Lessons | 98% specific from diffs | Human-curated + auto-extracted |
+| Workflow | Invisible | Session protocol + WIP persistence |

fixCommits.author: 9tvf4k6srt-sys
fixCommits.msg: fix(battle): Auto-start game when overlay isn't visible on iOS
fixCommits.body:
Debug showed overlay never appears on iOS mobile — user goes straight to
empty game board with no START button.

Fix: After init, check if overlay is actually visible. If not, auto-start:
build deck, deal hand, start game immediately — no overlay needed.
If overlay IS visible (desktop), START button flow works as before.

Cache bust v5.3.

fixCommits.author: 9tvf4k6srt-sys
fixCommits.msg: fix(battle): Don't block init on Audio.init() - fixes iOS hand empty bug
fixCommits.body:
Root cause found via mobile debug: init() was stuck at 'await Audio.init()'
on iOS. Web Audio API requires user gesture on iOS Safari, so Audio.init()
was hanging/slow. This blocked the START button from being wired, meaning
deck building and hand dealing never happened.

Fix: Audio.init() now runs in background (fire-and-forget with catch).
START button is wired immediately after cards load. Cache bust v5.2.

- Added on-screen debug panel (green monospace text at bottom) that shows
  on mobile what's happening: init, card count, START click, deck/hand
  sizes, renderHand count
- Added ?v=5.1 cache busting to nw-card-engine.js and nw-battle-engine.js

fixCommits.author: 9tvf4k6srt-sys
fixCommits.msg: fix(battle): Move deck building + hand dealing to START button click
fixCommits.body:
Root cause: Decks were built and hands dealt during init() (page load),
but before the user clicked START. By the time startGame() ran,
gameState could be stale or hands empty due to race conditions.

Fix:
- Moved all deck building and hand dealing INTO the START button handler
- Cards are now dealt fresh RIGHT BEFORE the countdown starts
- Added safety check in startGame() — if hand is still empty, re-deal
- Added debug logging: deck sizes and hand sizes at each step
- renderHand() has null/gameStats safety checks

This ensures cards are ALWAYS in hand when the game renders.

fixCommits.author: 9tvf4k6srt-sys
fixCommits.msg: fix(battle): Mobile hand cards visibility + fix Illegal return statement
fixCommits.body:
- CSS: Board rows changed from flex:1 (greedy) to flex:0 0 auto (fixed)
  so they don't push hand section below viewport on mobile
- CSS: Compact mobile breakpoints (480px/360px) - reduced padding, card
  sizes, and element heights to fit everything in viewport
- CSS: Battle board uses flex:1 1 0 with overflow:hidden so it shrinks
  to fit available space between header and hand
- CSS: Hand section and action bar get flex-shrink:0 to stay visible
- CSS: Safe area inset padding for notched phones
- JS: renderHand() now has null/gameStats safety checks + debug logging
- JS: After game start, auto-scrolls arena to show hand section
- Fix: nw-components.js had premature IIFE close at line 693 (return +
  })()) causing 'Illegal return statement' for emoji system code that
  followed. Removed duplicate export block, kept v1.1 export with emoji
  replacement functions inside IIFE

fixCommits.author: 9tvf4k6srt-sys
fixCommits.msg: fix(battle): Fix mobile hand cards not visible — arena overflow + flex layout
fixCommits.body:
Root cause: .arena-container was position:fixed with no overflow,
and .battle-board had flex:1 which greedily consumed all space,
pushing the hand section and action bar below the viewport on mobile.

Fixes:
- Add overflow-y:auto to .arena-container so content can scroll
- Change .battle-board from flex:1 to flex:1 1 0 with min-height:0
- Add flex-shrink:0 to .hand-section and .action-bar
- Set .battle-board to flex:0 0 auto in mobile breakpoints (768px, 480px)
- Set .board-row to flex:0 0 auto to prevent vertical stretching
- Add safe-area-inset-bottom padding for iOS notch phones
- Add -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch for smooth mobile scrolling

fixCommits.author: 9tvf4k6srt-sys
fixCommits.msg: fix: Restore homepage — remove GSAP defer, fix digit-starting i18n keys
fixCommits.body:
Root cause: The defer attribute we added to GSAP CDN scripts broke index.html.
GSAP was loading AFTER inline scripts that depend on it, causing:
- 'gsap is not defined' error
- All .reveal elements stuck at opacity:0 (never animated in)
- CP Race data never loaded
- Hero RegginA portrait invisible (content below stuck hidden)
- Everything appeared dark/empty

Fixes:
1. Removed defer from GSAP scripts on index.html (has 21 inline gsap refs)
2. Removed defer from Chart.js on markets.html (has inline Chart usage)
3. Fixed invalid JS keys starting with digits (9ActiveMembers, 2024NumbahwanGuild,
   1stEdition, 0Days, 5Luck, 7slotWorkGloves, etc.) — JS requires quoted keys
   for digit-starting identifiers. Prefixed all with 'n' across 9 pages.

Results: 0 console errors | 149/149 tests green | All sections rendering

fixCommits.msg: feat(sentinel): Upgrade to v2.5 — 10-module health platform with trend tracking & auto-fix engine
fixCommits.body:
SENTINEL v2.5.0 — Ultimate Code Health Platform

10 Audit Modules (was 6):
  1. Architecture (15%) — file size, complexity, route distribution
  2. Assets (15%) — image optimization, CSS/JS bloat, format audit
  3. i18n (10%) — translation coverage, hardcoded strings
  4. Dead Code (10%) — unused exports, orphan pages
  5. Security (15%) — secrets, unsafe patterns, SQL injection, headers
  6. Performance (10%) — bundle size, deps, page weight, lazy loading
  7. API Surface (8%) — 186 endpoint inventory, error handling, rate limiting
  8. Dependencies (7%) — unused deps, @types misplacement, lock file
  9. Accessibility (5%) — H1/main/alt/ARIA/form labels, semantic HTML
 10. SEO & Meta (5%) — title/description/OG/canonical/sitemap/robots

New Systems:
  - Trend Tracker: scores across builds, regression detection, streaks
  - Auto-Fix Engine: 10 fix scripts (6 automated, 4 manual)
  - Regression Gate: --no-regress CI flag blocks score drops

14 API Endpoints:
  /sentinel, /sentinel/quick

fixCommits.msg: fix: 🖼️ Battle page images now load properly on iOS
fixCommits.body:
ROOT CAUSE:
- Battle page used CSS class 'loading' with opacity:0
- iOS Safari's class manipulation with onload was unreliable

FIX:
- Changed to inline style opacity approach (same as PvP page)
- Added .loaded class for CSS transition
- Added console.log for debugging image loads
- Hides placeholder on successful load

TESTED: All 20 card images load successfully in Playwright

fixCommits.msg: fix: AI Guide chat input not working after language change
fixCommits.body:
Root cause: updateChatHTML() replaced the DOM elements but
bindInputEvents() was not called afterward, leaving the send
button and input field without event handlers.

Fixed in 2 places:
- storage event listener (line 871)
- nw-lang-change event listener (line 901)

Now both call bindInputEvents() after updateChatHTML().

fixCommits.author: genspark_dev
fixCommits.msg: 🔧 FIX: Card reveal animation - rename variable conflict + safety net
fixCommits.body:
ROOT CAUSE: Variable 'revealCard' conflicted with function name 'revealCard()'
- JS was setting scale(0.3) but animation wasn't completing properly
- Variable shadowing caused unpredictable behavior

FIXES:
1. Renamed variable to 'revealCardEl' to avoid conflict
2. Added CSS classes for entrance animation (card-entrance-start/end)
3. Added SAFETY NET: Card always reaches full size after 600ms
4. Increased max-height from 70vh to 75vh for more room

SIZING NOW:
- Pack: 80vw × calc(80vw * 1.4)
- Card: 80vw × calc(80vw * 1.4)
- IDENTICAL - guaranteed by CSS

ANIMATION FLOW:
1. Card starts at scale(0.3) via CSS class
2. NW_ANIM springs to scale(1) OR CSS transition
3. Safety timeout ensures scale(1) after 600ms

fixCommits.author: genspark_dev
fixCommits.msg: 🎴 FIX: Pack body = Card size, Seal is EXTRA on top
fixCommits.body:
PROBLEM: Pack total size = card size, but pack has seal + body
This meant pack body (art) was smaller than card reveal!

SOLUTION:
- Pack total = card height + seal height (50px)
- Pack body = card size EXACTLY
- Card reveal = card size EXACTLY
- When seal tears off, remaining pack body = card size

Added:
- NW_SIZING helper for unified sizing debug
- Better seal tear-off animation (flies away realistically)
- CSS variables: --card-width, --card-height, --seal-height, --pack-height

Visual flow:
1. Pack shown (card + seal on top)
2. Swipe tears seal off (animates flying away)
3. Card emerges = same size as pack body
4. Perfect size match!

fixCommits.msg: Fix card flip - single solid card, no visible layers
fixCommits.body:
CHANGES:
- Card back: translateZ(0) + outline trick to hide sub-pixel gaps
- Card front: translateZ(1px) to prevent z-fighting during rotation
- Solid #000 background on all layers (no transparency gaps)
- --frame-thickness: 0px removes the inner frame gap completely
- All inner elements use inset: 0 for full-bleed
- Hide all decorative overlays (frame, banner, stats, cost, badge)
- Only shows the card art image during reveal

Result: Card appears as ONE solid piece during flip animation

fixCommits.author: genspark_dev
fixCommits.msg: Fix black triangle artifact - unified border-radius and full-bleed inner
fixCommits.body:
ROOT CAUSE:
- .card-face had 16px radius, but .nw-card-inner had 12px
- .nw-card-inner was inset by 8px (frame-thickness) leaving gap

FIX:
- ALL elements now use 16px border-radius consistently
- .nw-card-inner in reveal uses inset: 0 (full bleed, no frame gap)
- .nw-card background set to transparent
- Added isolation: isolate for proper stacking context
- Forced --inner-radius: 16px via CSS variable override

fixCommits.author: genspark_dev
fixCommits.msg: Fix card frame overflow - remove triangle artifacts
fixCommits.body:
CSS FIXES:
- Added overflow: hidden and isolation: isolate to .nw-card base
- Changed all ::after pseudo-elements from inset: -Xpx to inset: 0
- Epic pulse border: inset -2px → inset 0
- Legendary shimmer: inset -3px → inset 0
- Mythic glow: inset -4px → inset 0
- All border-radius now use var(--card-radius) consistently

FORGE REVEAL FIXES:
- Added overflow: hidden to .card-render-container
- Added overflow: hidden to .card-front
- Hide ::after effects in reveal with display: none !important

This ensures cards display cleanly without any visual artifacts
poking outside the card frame boundaries.
